falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day average trading volume exceeds 200% of the 60-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate continued market participation and momentum, contradicting the expectation of a blowoff decline.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout above a major bearish trendline would invalidate the pattern's expectation of continued downward pressure.

falsification_conditions.condition: A bullish engulfing candlestick pattern forms with a 3%+ body size in the final 7 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This specific reversal pattern would directly contradict the blowoff scenario's assumption of bearish dominance.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
